functional_audit.check: computePillarScore(q1..q5) returns one-decimal average matching onboarding step pillar math (bTHxW/bTHxo parity)
calculateUserStability/Alignment/Performance load onboarding answers, compute pillar score, and patch stability_score_number / alignment_score_number / performance_score_number via Supabase
completeOnboarding invokes runPillarScoreCalculators(userId) after saveOnboarding in stability → alignment → performance order (bTHVC/bTHja/bTHgY chain)

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight lists eight related prototype files but declares reuse_decision "new"; actual work extended completeOnboarding and added lib modules under frontend/src/lib/userProfile/, which is gap-fill/extend not greenfield.
critiques.alternative: Set reuse_decision to "gap-fill" or "extend" and note mapped_target_files from frontend/src/api/userProfile/ to frontend/src/lib/userProfile/.

critiques.finding: Bubble user fields sq1_number..pq5_number and *_score_number are patched into profiles.onboarding_data JSONB (and results when present) because the prototype schema has no dedicated score columns; downstream API-02 may need to read the same JSONB keys.
critiques.alternative: Document the JSONB key contract in pillarScoreUserData.ts or add typed profile columns in a future migration if project/supabase adopts flat user score fields.

critiques.finding: No unit tests cover computePillarScore edge cases or readQuestionScores fallback between flat *_number keys and nested stabilityScores/alignmentScores/performanceScores objects.
critiques.alternative: Add focused tests for aggregatePillarScore and pillarScoreUserData.readQuestionScores with both Bubble-flat and prototype-nested onboarding_data shapes.
